settingsEnabledDesc: Display an escalating alert panel when a meeting is about to start.
settingsLeadTimeDesc: How many minutes before a meeting to start showing the alert.
settingsAnimationDesc: How the alert panel animates to get your attention.
settingsChimeDesc: Sound a tone when the alert escalates to a new urgency level.
settingsStrobeWarning: ⚠ Strobe flashing can trigger photosensitive seizures. This option is automatically disabled if your operating system reduces motion. Only enable if you are not photosensitive.
settingsStrobeOptIn: I understand the risk — enable strobe
